name: idapython
description: IDA Pro Python scripting for reverse engineering, decompilation, xrefs, functions, names, bytes, and ida_* APIs.

response_contract.expected_output: IDAPython code or analysis guidance grounded in the selected docs.
must_include: Provide IDAPython code when the user asks for code.
Mention required imports used by the script.
Mention validation or dry-run steps when the task can mutate an IDB.
must_avoid: Do not present mutating database changes as already applied.

suggested_checks: Call ida_auto.auto_wait() before reading analysis results.
Prefer structured read-only tools before execute_idapython.
For mutations, preview a dry-run ChangeSet before applying.
failure_behavior: If Hex-Rays is unavailable, fall back to disassembly and xrefs.
If a symbol is missing, search names/imports before hardcoding addresses.
